Name: SQUID Sensor Array
Description: Superconducting Quantum Interference Device array for detecting ultra-weak magnetic fields. Requires cryogenic cooling.

Name: Cryocooler
Description: Provides the necessary cryogenic temperatures for SQUID sensor operation without liquid helium.

Name: Low-Noise Pre-Amplifier Array
Product Name: Analog Devices ADA4807 Quad Pre-Amp Module
Description: Amplifies extremely weak SQUID signals with minimal added noise before further processing.

Name: RF Filter Array
Description: Passively filters out high-frequency electromagnetic interference before signal amplification.

Name: Multi-Channel Lock-in Amplifier
Description: Extracts small signals from noisy backgrounds using phase-sensitive detection. High-speed multi-channel operation.

Name: High-Resolution ADC Module
Description: Converts analog signals from the lock-in amplifier into high-resolution digital data.

Name: FPGA/DSP Processor
Description: Performs real-time signal conditioning, initial noise reduction, and high-speed data buffering before AI processing.

Name: AI Embedded System
Description: Powerful embedded platform for running AI inference models to filter EMI and localize magnetic fields.

Name: Wireless Communication Module
Description: Provides high-bandwidth, low-latency wireless data transmission to a control station.

Name: SQUID Cryogenic Power Supply
Description: Provides ultra-stable, low-noise current and voltage to the SQUID sensors.

Name: High-Capacity Battery Pack
Description: Primary power source for the entire portable system, offering high capacity and cycle life.

Name: Main Power Distribution Unit
Description: Regulates and distributes power from the battery to various components (e.g., 24V, 12V, 5V, 3.3V rails).

Name: Multi-Axis Motor Driver
Description: Controls multiple stepper motors for the robotic arm or gantry system to scan the SQUID sensors.

Name: Main Base Platform
Description: Heavy-duty, non-magnetic aluminum plate forming the base of the entire system for stability and mounting vibration isolation feet.

Name: Vibration Isolation Feet
Description: Rubber/spring isolation feet to minimize external vibrations transmitted to the system.

Name: Gantry Vertical Extrusions
Description: Sturdy vertical aluminum extrusions to form the uprights of the gantry system.

Name: Gantry X-Axis Extrusion
Description: Horizontal aluminum extrusion for the X-axis movement of the SQUID sensor head.

Name: X-Axis Linear Rail
Description: Precision linear guide rail for smooth and accurate X-axis motion.

Name: X-Axis Linear Carriage
Description: Linear bearing block to move along the X-axis rail.

Name: X-Axis Lead Screw
Description: Lead screw for precise X-axis positioning, driven by a stepper motor.

Name: X-Axis Lead Screw Nut
Description: Anti-backlash nut for accurate and repeatable X-axis motion.

Name: X-Axis Lead Screw Coupler
Description: Connects the X-axis stepper motor to the lead screw.

Name: Main Electronics Enclosure
Description: Non-magnetic aluminum enclosure housing the pre-amplifiers, ADC, FPGA, AI system, and power distribution.

Name: Mu-Metal Shielding Panels
Description: High-permeability alloy panels used to passively shield the SQUID sensors from external magnetic interference.

Name: SQUID Cryostat Outer Housing
Description: Lightweight, non-magnetic carbon fiber housing for the SQUID sensor array and integrated cryocooler.

Name: M5 T-Nuts
Description: Used to connect components to the aluminum extrusions.

Name: M5 Bolts
Description: Fasteners for assembling the gantry structure and mounting components.

Name: M3 PCB Standoffs
Description: Used to mount circuit boards inside the electronics enclosure.

Name: Electronics Board Mounts
Description: Custom mounts designed to securely hold specific PCBs (pre-amp, ADC, FPGA, AI system) within the electronics enclosure.

Name: SQUID Sensor Mount
Description: Internal mount to precisely position the SQUID sensor array within its cryostat housing, non-magnetic.

Name: Cryocooler Mounting Bracket
Description: Custom bracket to securely mount the cryocooler to the main gantry structure or dedicated platform.

Name: Mu-metal Panel Holders
Description: Small clips or frames to hold the Mu-metal shielding panels in place around the SQUID sensor head.

Name: Cable Management Clips
Description: Custom cable clips to route and secure signal and power cables, minimizing movement and potential EMI.
